review_text:
Amenities not clean, only one toilet door shut in female toilet (only two toilets in block). Men’s urinal out of order. Brought up with the new owners of the Park on the first day. Stayed 3 nights and door lock not fixed and toilets not cleaned entire stay. BBQs out of order. Lawns overgrown and unkept. Children’s playground a safety tripping hazard with exposed plastic.
When leaving brought up again with owners and they refunded a nights stay.

Unkept park.  Grass overgrown, bathroom facilities dirty and not cleaned in the three days we have been here.  No soap in bathrooms and don’t let the kids go in the pool. A lot of facilities out of order.  Go elsewhere

Great place to stay
Caravan park !!

The room was not clean at all. It was like the person before had cleaned it and that was enough. Has not been decobwebed in a long time. The booking included shampoo and conditioner there was only soap. The neighbours shower made an ear piercing scream. So much I ended up with a headache. I would not stay there again very disappointing.

This caravan park is a health hazard. Arrived for a 3 night stay at this park. Overgrown grass, shattered glass, toilets closed and faeces outside this particular one that looked to be human, obviously because the person couldn’t get in. But this faeces sat there for the whole 3 days we were there so obviously no one had checked this area of the park. The pool, I wouldn’t recommend anyone using, also no life saving equipment to be seen, not even a pool ring. No map of the park on presentation to the office available.

We had a great stay here. Our 3 bedroom villa was well appointed and comfortable. No WIFI but that wasn't a problem for us. The kids swam in the pool and we spent most  of our days out touring. Unfortunately the games room was closed for repairs, but, the new owners are endeavouring to refresh the facilities. Shopping Centre was right behind the park and very handy. Would stay here again.

Had a 4 night stay on a ensuite site not very good place was not kept up to standard
Barbecues were all out of order toilet block and dump point were out of order
Could not find the camp kitchen or another toilet block
Grounds were poor coverd in leaves and grass not cut
Left after 3 days no one to help us
Would not recommend to anyone 0 stars
Nice friendly staff and nice rooms .very clean rooms inside ..new management doing 👍great job

Hey manager
We stay here last week so we really happy with this staff and nice to environment and good deluxe rooms .new management doing good job
Nice staff and new management and nice deluxe rooms .we happy to stay again here
Great caravan park! Clean facilities, friendly staff, and a peaceful atmosphere. Perfect for a relaxing stay. Would definitely come back and recommend it.
Just ew, wasn’t properly cleaned and was a bad experience
Booked in at late notice and staff were very helpful. Park itself is a bit older, but has everything you need and the camp kitchen had everything we needed

Had a en-suit sites. Very dirty. Gardener mowing what lawn there is. More dirt very dusty. Dust and crap flying every where, over everyone's vans. Car speeding around park. Use to be a nice park. But new owners have let the standed down. Very over priced of what you get. Showers Very low water pressure, just a dribble.  Wouldn't be going back there.

Great Location,
Wheelchair accessible ensuites available

Love that it was pet friendly

I recently stayed at Kalganyi Holiday Park with my kids, and it was a wonderful experience! The accommodations were family-friendly, providing ample space and comfort for everyone. The staff were exceptionally helpful, always ready to assist and cater to our needs, which made our stay even more enjoyable. The pricing was very reasonable, making it a fantastic value for families looking for a getaway. My children loved the amenities and the surrounding area, and we all left with happy memories. I highly recommend Kalganyi Holiday Park for families seeking a pleasant and affordable stay!

I recently enjoyed a two-night stay at Kalganyi Holiday Park, and it was a delightful experience. The accommodations were both nice and comfortable, featuring clean and well-maintained units that provided all the essentials for a relaxing stay. The staff were exceptional, greeting me with warm smiles and a genuine willingness to assist with any needs or questions I had about the local area. Their hospitality made me feel truly at home. Overall, Kalganyi Holiday Park is a fantastic choice for anyone looking to unwind or explore, and I’m looking forward to visiting again in the future!

Will never stay there again. No map to direct us on to our site. Said it was site 39. Couldnt find it. So returned to office and was shown to our site. Faded paint on the ground said it was a completely different site number.  Were not shown where the facilities were. 2 toilets and only one shower!! Both dirty. We are lucky we are self contained.  Not enough room on our site meant people were walking through our set up. When we came to leave the person next to us needed to move his car so we could get our van out because it was such a tight spot. A very unsatisfactory stay. We won't stay there again. A waste of $55 for one night.!!!

We stayed in a en- suit sites for a few weeks.  En.suit very dirty we had to clean it ourself. Very dusty spider website and shower very poor. Very low water pressure.  I could pee faster. Grass around van very long, mowed it myself
Park very dirty Grass over grown.  Bbq very dirty.never clean. If they worked. We to office told that people need to clean after use. But no cleaning gear there. Very dusty after a few days Grass die and very turn ti dust. Managers very layed back and didn't want to know.  Cleaners flying around park about 40 kls hr. When it's 5-8 kls hr. Pool not keep very well. They didn't know how to treat it. Never came to check if tolet paper need or shower curtains need to be changed etc. Never going back there. Only deal in cash money so they don't pay taxes.

I’m aware that this caravan park is under new management so hopefully with time this place can be turned around into something awesome. Arrived at 3pm and no one was in reception. Had to call a mobile number to check in. Booked a cabin which was average. Place was fairly clean but the linen had seen better days. The bunk beds felt unsafe with no railing at the top and the ladder hard to navigate. Beds were extremely uncomfortable and the double bed felt smaller than standard double bed sizes. Park itself would have been great back in its heyday but needs a lot of maintenance done. As others have mentioned gardens were overgrown and playground was rusty. Hopefully with time the new owners will bring this tired park back to its potential. Great location with Woolies being next door. Split system worked a treat for the hot summer days.

Very old cabins that need updating or demolishing.
Very old facilities. There are unsuite bathrooms for campers and caravaners.
The roads around the sites are old and bumpy. There is a small playground and heated pool.
The website states the price as 150 per night, but in reality they charged me 350 per night. Moreover, there’s no option to get a refund.

This was one of the worst accommodation experiences I’ve had.

I was charged AUD 350 for one night, which is completely unjustifiable given the condition of the room. The room was extremely small, poorly maintained, and far below acceptable standards. The curtains could not be fully closed, compromising privacy, and the sofa had visible white stains, raising serious concerns about cleanliness and hygiene.

The overall condition of the room did not match the price, photos, or description at all. It felt old, uncomfortable, and unclean. This was absolutely not worth the amount charged.

After raising these issues, there was no meaningful accountability. I was told to “follow up” but no clear explanation or fair resolution was provided.

I would strongly not recommend this place, especially if you value cleanliness, transparency, or value for money. Please be very cautious before booking.
Room was smelly and the game rooms were in horrible condition

I have been  staying  here  on and off for 7yrs (as rellies  live nearby.)  In an Rv and  trailer  . All sites are levelled  and roomy. Park is well kept clean.  Safe for kids. close  walking distances 10 mins to plaza  and ,bunnings next door . No noise from their carparking.   More shops  info ,pubs  etc   a short drive  into. town. Highly recommended. . Best Park in Mt g .(3yrs ago  "leased "caretakers  let the park get rundown .   Was sad at the time  seeing this happening . They were  removed  from their lease.   Original owners came back and restored  it all back to  excellent  condition.  )   new management  are now situated there . . Well done to the owners. A credit to you . .

Powered site in our caravan. 3 bbqs all out of order. I in camp kitchen. Laundry had 3 washing machines only 1 working. Toilets disgusting spare toilet rolls lying on the floor sinks filthy no handwash or paper towels . Dump point out of order. Had to use one in town. In 21 years the dirtiest place ever.
very good location. very friendly staff and nice hospitality in caravan .
The place and its facilities have noticeably declined since the new management took over. Hosts are not friendly.

Place was an utter disgrace. Playground was rusty and dangerous. Weeds littered throughout the park. Our gutter was laying next to our cabin. The room inside was dirty especially the floor. I'd give it 0 stars if I could. How anyone could give this a 5 stars means either you are blind or are affiliated with the park in some way.

The park seems to have been recently bought and the new owners are just finding their feet .
The cabin was clean and water pressure was great . The reverse cycle aircon worked great . We found the beds hard but linens were clean and fresh . There's no hand towels in bathroom .
The park needed a good gardner , as it was overgrown and scruffy looking .
Staff were friendly and helpful , we will definitely book here again , and see how the new owners are progressing .

10/10 experience. The staff make all the difference with their above and beyond customer service. Such lovely people. I would definitely reccomend this place. Clean spatious holiday homes with everything you need.

This place should not be advertised as family accommodation. The pool area was unsafe and unhygienic for children, and the entire park was overgrown, dirty, and neglected. The children’s playground was rusty and dangerous.

The cabin itself was filthy — furniture was damaged, couches were stained, and the smell in the room was awful. It was clear that cleanliness and maintenance are not a priority here.

We tried to leave and find somewhere else to stay, but everything nearby was fully booked. To top it off, the manager came banging on our door after 9pm demanding payment in a completely unprofessional manner.

Avoid this place at all costs. It was one of the worst accommodation experiences we’ve ever had.
Great place
Offer to upgrade was actually a downgrade. Communication issues with getting the rooms actually booked made for a poor experience.  New management need to improve.
Nice location and good for children
Excellent hospitality and service in budget friendly price!!
Excellent service from start to finish. The staff were welcoming and helpful, It is in a convenient location, close to cafes and local attractions. Highly recommend for travellers.

We had a wonderful stay at this motel. The room was clean, spacious, and well-maintained. The staff were very friendly and helpful, making check-in and check-out smooth. The location was convenient, close to shops and attractions. Great value for money—would definitely stay again.

Most expensive at $55 / night for our first ever ensuite  powered site. Web says 40/50 for off peak/peak.  This was def off peak but charged premium End Aug 2025. Not sure why.
Worst shower out of many many caravan parks. Checked other ensuite and also just a dribble - thats a dribble not exageration. They could have the same volume thru a diff head and maybe ok, if water is premium.
Owners may respond with - you could have told us before review but when cold and early o'clock the last thing I wanted to do is hunt around and find someone to say the shower is abysmal knowing they would not be able to fix it anyway. And they would know, they made them that way.
On a +ve note they do seem to be trying to tidy the place up. Maybe they will get around to the showers in ensuite.
Justin
Best location and good service

This place is a hidden gem, Mick and Gail absolute fantastic hosts,if you come to Mt Gambier stay here, they cater for all needs, being cabins, caravanning, private ensuites. Pet friendly., and open fires👍👍👍👍and you feel like you are in the country but next door the a shopping centre, thank you Mick and Gail👍👍👍👍👍👍👍

Nous avons séjourné 7 semaines dans le camping. Nous remercions Mick et son épouse pour leur accueil. Les espaces sont vraiment très propres et répondait parfaitement à nos attentes.
Merci et à bientôt.
The frenchies
Max et Pauline

Have just had 2 night at this lovely park. Gail and Mick who are the owner /managers were so wonderful. Met Gail on check in, told us a good place to eat in town which we went to , great food.
Mick came and directed us on to our sites, very helpful. Also organised  some wood for our fire.
Rambo who works there also brought more wood for our fire.
Cannot praise these people enough for their service and Hospitality.
Would definitely recommend Kalganyi Park for a holiday.
Thanks Gail and Mick.
Jan and Laurie from Kingscliff,
NSW.

Our stay at Kalganyi Holiday Park we felt very welcome by Mick & Gail.
Most helpful in setting up our caravan. Large sites, amenities clean.
Mick provided some firewood for our fire and loves a good chat.
I would recommend this Caravan Park certainly you are a five minute drive out of the town.

Had the pleasure of staying at Kalganyi Holiday Park in our caravan. Mick and Gail who have re-established themselves as owner operators within the last 12 months were wonderful hosts. Friendly and informative about things to do and see in Mt Gambier. They made sure our stay was comfortable. Amenities while not new were exceptionally clean. Grounds were well maintained and it was nice to stay on some green grass in our travels.
Thanks guys!!
I was given permission to use the shower for a small fee, even though I was not staying the night.

Perfect location, With woolworths and big w in walking distance. Situated 5, 6 minutes away from local tourist attraction and town centre. Swimming pool  Games room, baseball court, Open area for camping, ensuite sites,Outdoor under covered camp kitchen. Rambo was a cracker, my son was swimming in the pool and it was freezing, My girls decided they were going to as well but then were hesitating  he did a chicken noise at them and they couldn't be called a chicken so they jumped in lol. Funny  😁 Toilets clean and tidy. Was a great stay, Thankyou for an easy stress free stay and the owners were lovely. Try to go out of their way to make people's stay perfect

Stayed over Easter, after reviewing previous reviews, can confirm the park is neat & tidy and owners are a pleasure. it appears previous management had let the place go almost to ruin. We stayed in a powered unsuited site &  have zero complaints.
The hard work that has gone into the park recently is evident & I would definitely stay here again
We recently stayed at the park over easter. Mick and Gail were lovely on arrival. The parks in a great location, quiet and plenty of space for the kids to play.

Lovely park up close to town. Staff very friendly, clean amenities and lush gardens. Extra large sites for vans, felt very welcome.
Happy to recomend travellers to come and stay
Bill Hodder ( Townsville)
Lovely spot. Shady, clean. Friendly staff. Road nearby can be busy. Shopping centre very nearby is convenient.
Beautiful little park. Clean, serine and peaceful. Just a tip....bug spray in the cabin for the spiders and ants. Thanks
awesome place I stayed here for 3 months

Fantastic caravan park close to everything in town. Lots of garden/green areas, great pool and facilities. Large caravan sites. Mick and Gail were lovely hosts and very helpful. Would definitely stay again.

We spent 5 nights with 4 groups 3 caravans and 1 unit , it was a lovely stay, owners were amazing and even helped my parents out after  issue with there caravan , would highly recommend ! Price is great and location is easy to get to
Great place ! Owner and son work really hard here fantastic spot !!

Subpar is putting it kindly. Clearly had not been cleaned, rubbish still in bin from previous visitors. Very limited cooking amenities, and no instructions on how to work the oven and stove. We could not cook within our accommodation. TV didn't work, sound only. We were expecting basic, but this was incredibly poor. Would not come back here, would not recommend. Rooms and beds smell like urine, dishes were dirty and wet? I know thats not the cleaners job but it did not win them any points either. Tiny aircon (which also stank) no wifi. Staff seemed nice enough at least.

We recently stayed in a family unit for two nights while our van was being repaired. The owners, Mick and Gail, were excellent hosts, going above and beyond to ensure we had everything we needed.

The park itself features large green areas, perfect for kids to play. The van sites appeared to all have ensuites, which is a great bonus. The entire park is exceptionally clean and well-maintained.

I would highly recommend this park to anyone in the area—it truly exceeded our expectations!

The owners could not have been more welcoming, helpful and accommodating.
Our spacious site was EXCELLENT, lush grass and easily accessible.
The sites appeared to be well spread out, the grounds were excellent and well maintained. They have an old tennis court as an off leash area for the dogs.
The amenities block was a little outdated but clean.
My only disappointment was we'd only booked for 1 night. I wish we'd stayed there longer.
old, no wi fi or rec rooms  not much of a camp kitchen. located on major busy road, very noisy
We found Mick & Gail very welcoming, everything was very clean & would recommend anyone to stay here & enjoy the park

This was a last minute booking for us and after reading the Google reviews, I was absolutely delighted! We booked an en suite powered site and it was spotless. The bathroom had a clean bath mat for us to use and a heated light, which was very much appreciated in the chilly morning. The grounds are beautiful, with big shady trees and they have an enclosed dog run as well.
It's a short walk to a shopping mall which has Big W and Woolworths.
Gail and Mick are doing a wonderful job of turning this place around after previous management let it fall to the wayside. I cannot fault a thing.

**Conveniently Located Caravan Park with Great Amenities and Friendly Management**

We recently stayed at this caravan park near the Mount Gambier Marketplace shopping centre, and were pleasantly surprised by the improvements and upgrades under the new management. In the past, the park had received some negative reviews and was known to be a bit run-down, but it’s clear the current owners are dedicated to revitalising it. They are friendly, welcoming, and went above and beyond to accommodate us, especially when my husband had to be hospitalised in Mount Gambier.

The park itself has a range of amenities that cater to a variety of needs. Many of the sites come with ensuites, and the ablution blocks were consistently clean. There’s a well-equipped camp kitchen with BBQs, a cooktop, a microwave, and a fridge, as well as additional BBQ gazebos throughout the park. The laundry facilities include three washing machines and dryers, and there's even a baby’s bathroom.

For pet owners, there’s an enclosed dog area repurposed from an old tennis court, which is very convenient. There’s also a swimming pool on-site and several on-site accommodation units for those who prefer a more comfortable option.

One of the best perks is the park's proximity to the shopping center, which includes Big W, Woolworths, a chemist, and specialty stores, plus a Bunnings within walking distance.

Overall, it’s a comfortable, well-located, and friendly place to stay in Mount Gambier. The efforts of the new management really show, and I’d definitely recommend it for anyone visiting the area!

Wonderful, small holiday park with lots of trees and a quiet and relaxing environment. Cabin was modern, clean and had plenty of space. Management were friendly and helpful. They were quite happy to let us top up the charge on our EV overnight from an outside power point.

We stayed here for 5 nights and it was absolutely beautiful. Gail and Michael are beautiful people and they were both so helpful to make our stay happen. We really enjoyed ourselves and will definitely be going back again. Also met some amazing people and made a couple of good friends
New managers are very friendly and making updates to the park. Facilities were clean.
Excellent caravan park, one of the best we have stayed in across three states. Very clean, green and shady. Welll worth considering for your holiday caravan park in Mount Gambier!

It is good to see this park under new management with great owners and the grounds staff who are skilled and working hard to upgrade all facilities.
The park is in a great location within walking distance of Bunnings and the shopping centre. We have been here a week and witnessed the hard work in progress first hand. It is a very dog friendly park with a great fenced dog run available to use. It is in a lovely bushland setting with lots of bird life to admire.
The groundsman is a great asset to the new management (Rambo) who is always friendly and helpful to make sure you have an enjoyable stay. We found it a pleasant place to enjoy a week of relaxation.

Colin and Kim Harriman

The owners of the park, Mick and Gail, took over the management of the park about 8 weeks ago so any previous reviews aren't really relevant. They can't do enough for you and are great to deal with. They are in the process of rejuvenating the park with work evident in most areas. We had a great site with a spotlessly clean ensuite. The park is central to most things with a shopping centre, Bunnings and service station literally at your back door.  Although close to the road noise is not an issue. Fees are very competitive. Give them a try. You will not be disappointed. Stayed early September.

We are in motorhome and are enjoying our stay here in Kalganyi Holiday Park. Owners are lovely people and are making sure that our stay is the best, due to the windy weather we all have experienced.
Just around the corner is access to shopping centre and Bunnings.
Please if in this area come stay, I'm sure you will enjoy.

UNDER NEW MANAGEMENT Awesome park. Nice and quiet.
Price is better that some others.
Powered sites and plenty of room.
Our dogs were welcome.
Finally the owners have managed to get rid of previous management and are off and running, keen to return this beautiful park to its former glory. We're really looking forward to our next visit!!
Quiet location older caravan park but had all you need for a comfortable base to explore local attractions

Didn't even get to stay at the park. Made a booking, tried to confirm my booking and make payment however the gentleman scoffed at me for ringing so late, I rang during business hours according to their website. I asked if he was able to confirm my booking, he laughed and said no I'm cooking dinner right now. He was quiet rude in his responses and seemed more interested in his frypan.

Will never stay here again if I can help it. Bed was hard and so uncomfortable (suppose to be a double but was 2 singles zipped together) aircon was pretty well useless, shower was horrible and everything was so old and crappy especially the furniture which I've seen better left on the side of the road for hard rubbish pick up. TV was tiny and old, couldn't get any hd channels, hardly worth it. No wifi. Doesn't look like they really care about presenting a nice caravan park, just want to overcharge you for what should really be a cheap as budget caravan park
Bloody little ripper of a caravan park great park great people that own and work here, will definitely stay again, 🙂

Stayed for a short holiday in our van.
Staff are fantastic al amenities were spotless.
Sites have ample room and are well kept.
Great camp kitchen and plenty of ensiutes.
Highly recommend well worth staying here for a break.
We will be back

Very bad service!
Made a booking but unfortunately have to cancel due to family circumstances. We cancel 4 months before the date. The website say that if you cancel before 14 days they will have to charge 25% of our deposit booking fee.
We are happy with that, but at the end they charge us 50%.
We try to contact many times, via email and phone but no response.
We wait 3 months to resolve the issue but still no response.

Ensuite power site.  Arrived at 12pm noone in office sign said come back at 2pm. So we drove around but decided to ring them 5 times before someone answered finally answered said they will open up.
Ensuite was dirty with spiders and dirt dust. Ours had a hole in wall. We had to clean it before we used it. Also saw people come and go the cleaner came looked inside and locked it back up without cleaning it.
Bbq area was unkept and dirty.
Asked for them to clean the pool that wasn't done. Very disappointing park. We wont be back.
Got there day early 2pm check in came and went.woman came over told us owner's managers went out for the day.we had to find another park.terrible park overgrown grass.
Unprofessional and rude

Great spot within a few minutes walk of Woolworths, Big W and Bunnings.
Unfortunately for us the games room was under repair.  That made it a bit difficult as we were there in the cold and rain.

Don't bother! Go somewhere else.
Organised to have multiple cabins for one night for just over $700 which I was willing to pay. Only to be told the next day the manager has requested a minimum of two nights!

I explained that we would only be there for one night and was told if we wanted to retain our booking we would have to pay for two nights for each cabin which then would be $1400.

Completely poor service and don't understand why you would turn away a paying customer. Thankfully another site nearby was willing to take one night bookings and about the same price!

Go somewhere else!
No. Just don't. It bad. Ripped. Shafted. I done has been all over and this is the worst.

Do not stay here if you can help it. Tiny air-conditioning not good enough to warm the place on a freezing day, no Wi-Fi, tiny, tiny TV, smaller than my laptop with horrible, horrible
metallic audio, really hard bed, no bedside lamps, no bedside table, no lounge chairs. No powet points in the bedroom, all the plates, pots and cooking utilities were filthy.
We had to wash everything before we could cook and eat from supplied utensils. The enamel on the frypan was so badly scratched and it was so filty we just couldn't use it...don't stay here if you can help it. It's not worth it.

!HIGHLY DO NOT RECCOMEND!
You will lost your money!!!

Would give 0 stars if I could. Room is absolutely disgusting and there's bugs everywhere. Beds hard as rocks. No power point next to bunk bed. Whole park in general is filthy. Room smells like cat urine.
I cancelled my reservation after checking in because I found  that the park is dirty !!
Useless

!HIGHLY DO NOT RECCOMEND!
Would give 0 stars if I could. Room is absolutely disgusting and there's bugs everywhere. Beds hard as rocks. No power point next to bunk bed. Whole park in general is filthy. Room smells like cat urine.

Wouldn't be going back,  arrived 11.30am and reception shut, and not happy to c us when he came. Very odd considering they look like they need every $. Site 17,18,19 gets rd noise. Women shower had water going everywhere except out of shower head.

Pretty fancy for being a caravan park.
(Not aware of price so I can’t tell if fair cause I came for work and company paid)
Booked a spa cabin, lot of space, confy and cozy.
Friendly all rounder is working pretty efficiently at the reception.
Good position at the entrance of the town
Nice quiet park
